what_it_does: Records ledger metadata for a design-source image asset (deck1-2026/p-16.jpg), including its address, blob reference, MIME type, provenance, author session, and creation timestamp.
observations: YAML frontmatter defines id, address, channel, path, blob, mime, name, width, height, source, author_session, created, and links.
Width and height are both set to 0.
The address uses an image://design-source URI scheme.
The blob is referenced via blob://b2:... .
The body contains a single line labeling the file as 'SOURCE design ground-truth — deck1-2026/p-16.jpg'.
source field is 'design_source_material' while channel is 'design-source'.
standouts: Width and height are zero despite being an image record.
The address and blob use custom URI schemes for resolution.
The body explicitly marks the entry as a SOURCE design ground-truth asset.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter for structured metadata followed by a short markdown body.
Represents assets with URI-style address and blob references.
Uses empty arrays for absent relationships.
Includes authorship and creation timestamps for provenance.
concerns: Width and height are 0, suggesting incomplete image metadata extraction.
No links or relationships to the containing deck or channel.
No description or alt text of the actual image content.
notes: A provenance stub for a design-source slide image that is addressable and blob-linked but lacks dimensions and relational context.
questions: Why are the image width and height recorded as 0?
What visual content does deck1-2026/p-16.jpg contain?
Should there be links to the deck or channel node?
Does 'design_source_material' differ semantically from the 'design-source' channel?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is to hold a SOURCE design ground-truth image; actual content is a metadata record pointing to that image, with zero dimensions and no links, so it is only partially realized.
intention_signals: To establish a stable, addressable identity for a design deck image so downstream systems can resolve its blob and attribute its creation.
contribution: Provides a stable addressable identity, blob pointer, and creation provenance for a design-source image, which a fused system can use to locate and attribute the asset.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory ledger markdown file describing the image asset deck1-2026/p-16.jpg with YAML metadata, a blob reference, and a source ground-truth label.
intention_for_embedding: To register a design-source image as an addressable, provenanced ground-truth asset in the ledger.
